name: 60qt Underbed Storage Bin with Latches - Brightroom™
description:
Step up to the Brightroom™ 60 Quart Clear Wheeled Latching Storage Bin with Lid and get organized! The clear base and lid allow you to easily view and locate stored contents from any angle. Color-accented latches secure the lid while providing a comfortable grip for carrying. Wheels make it easy to slide the bin under a bed, keeping items accessible yet out of sight. Recessed lids allow storage bins to stack neatly to maximize storage space. This plastic storage container is perfect for shoes, extra bedding, wrapping paper and more, helping bring order to closets, bedrooms, and dorm rooms with ease.
Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
